name: NDA Duration
text: The confidentiality obligations set forth in this Agreement shall survive its termination or expiration and continue for a period of five (5) years thereafter.
invalid_if: The stipulated duration is deemed an unreasonable restraint of trade under Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.
title: Confidentiality Duration
dispute_hotspots: Party terminates NDA and immediately uses CI — survival clause is critical
